message:
refactor(ft-xbnl0.2.5): remove all dual-runtime feature seams from frankenterm-core

Strip all #[cfg(not(feature = "asupersync-runtime"))] Tokio fallback blocks
and #[cfg(feature = "asupersync-runtime")] guards from 73 source files.

Net: -5193 lines of dead Tokio fallback code, -1059 cfg annotations removed.
Largest savings: storage.rs (-1862), snapshot_engine.rs (-363),
mux_client.rs (-294), web/sse.rs (-268), wezterm.rs (-245), ipc.rs (-221).

The asupersync path is now the sole async implementation across all of
frankenterm-core. No #[cfg(feature/not)] dual-runtime gates remain.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
